name_en: B Brand Pure TB Quilted Sheepskin Lauren Mini Bucket Bag, single shoulder or crossbody. Crafted from imported selected soft lamb leather with a smooth, comfortable touch and fine texture. The material is thick and smooth, maintaining shape. Decorated with signature quilting. Filled for a soft feel. Features a Thomas exclusive logo, minimalist modern silhouette, and a gold chain strap. Hidden magnetic closure with 3 card slots. Lightweight and practical. 20X16X4cm
